message:
Command `
echo "=== Flow status $(date) ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'
echo ""
tail -10 /tmp/librelane_fill.log 2>/dev/null
echo ""
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -6
` executed with exit code 0.
